diagnoses.name: Hypertensive chronic kidney disease with stage 3 CKD

diagnoses.evidence_span: atherosclerotic heart disease of the native coronary artery with angina pectoris

diagnoses.name: Acute postprocedural shock
diagnoses.evidence_span: Shortly after the procedure, he developed acute postprocedural shock complicated by postprocedural hemorrhage of a circulatory system organ

diagnoses.name: Hemoperitoneum
diagnoses.evidence_span: patient was found to have hemoperitoneum, peritonitis, and acute and subacute hepatic failure

diagnoses.name: Peritonitis
diagnoses.evidence_span: patient was found to have hemoperitoneum, peritonitis, and acute and subacute hepatic failure

diagnoses.name: Acute and subacute hepatic failure with coma
diagnoses.evidence_span: patient was found to have hemoperitoneum, peritonitis, and acute and subacute hepatic failure with coma

diagnoses.name: Acute kidney failure
diagnoses.evidence_span: Laboratory evaluation revealed acute kidney failure on top of his baseline moderate chronic kidney disease stage 3

diagnoses.name: Hepatorenal syndrome
diagnoses.evidence_span: Laboratory evaluation revealed acute kidney failure on top of his baseline moderate chronic kidney disease stage 3, hepatorenal syndrome

diagnoses.name: Acquired coagulation factor deficiency
diagnoses.evidence_span: Laboratory evaluation revealed acute kidney failure on top of his baseline moderate chronic kidney disease stage 3, hepatorenal syndrome, and acquired coagulation factor deficiency

diagnoses.name: Sepsis due to E. coli
diagnoses.evidence_span: Blood cultures subsequently grew E. coli, and the clinical picture was consistent with sepsis

diagnoses.name: Severe sepsis with septic shock
diagnoses.evidence_span: the clinical picture was consistent with sepsis progressing to severe sepsis with septic shock

diagnoses.name: Ventilator-associated pneumonia
diagnoses.evidence_span: he developed secondary infections including ventilator-associated pneumonia

diagnoses.name: Central venous catheter infection with methicillin-susceptible Staphylococcus aureus
diagnoses.evidence_span: he developed secondary infections including ventilator-associated pneumonia and an unspecified central venous catheter infection with methicillin-susceptible Staphylococcus aureus

diagnoses.name: Urinary tract infection
diagnoses.evidence_span: Urinary tract infection was also documented

diagnoses.name: Acute respiratory failure
diagnoses.evidence_span: The patient's acute presentation was further complicated by acute respiratory failure requiring intubation

diagnoses.name: Ileus
diagnoses.evidence_span: The patient's acute presentation was further complicated by acute respiratory failure requiring intubation, ileus, atelectasis

diagnoses.name: Atelectasis
diagnoses.evidence_span: The patient's acute presentation was further complicated by acute respiratory failure requiring intubation, ileus, atelectasis

diagnoses.name: Hypovolemic shock

diagnoses.name: Severe protein-calorie malnutrition
diagnoses.evidence_span: The patient's acute presentation was further complicated by acute respiratory failure requiring intubation, ileus, atelectasis, hypovolemic shock, and severe protein-calorie malnutrition

diagnoses.name: Postprocedural hemorrhage of circulatory system organ
diagnoses.evidence_span: he developed acute postprocedural shock complicated by postprocedural hemorrhage of a circulatory system organ

diagnoses.name: Altered mental status
diagnoses.evidence_span: presented via emergency department with altered mental status, severe abdominal distention, and hemodynamic instability

diagnoses.name: Hyponatremia
diagnoses.evidence_span: Electrolyte abnormalities including hypo-osmolality and hyponatremia were corrected

procedures.name: Cardiac catheterization with coronary angiography
procedures.evidence_span: had undergone recent cardiac catheterization with coronary angiography

procedures.name: Percutaneous central venous catheter placement in right atrium
procedures.evidence_span: A percutaneous central venous catheter was placed in the right atrium

procedures.name: Superior vena cava infusion device insertion
procedures.evidence_span: a superior vena cava infusion device was inserted for hemodynamic support

procedures.name: Endotracheal intubation
procedures.evidence_span: The patient was intubated via endotracheal airway placement for acute respiratory failure

procedures.name: Diagnostic paracentesis
procedures.evidence_span: Initial diagnostic paracentesis of the peritoneal cavity revealed hemoperitoneum

procedures.name: Therapeutic peritoneal drainage
procedures.evidence_span: subsequently, multiple therapeutic peritoneal drainages were performed percutaneously

procedures.name: Coronary fluoroscopy with contrast
procedures.evidence_span: Coronary fluoroscopy of both multiple coronary arteries and the right heart was performed using contrast for further evaluation

procedures.name: Occlusion of right vertebral artery with intraluminal devices
procedures.evidence_span: Vascular intervention was required, including occlusion of the right vertebral artery and right femoral artery with intraluminal devices via percutaneous approach

procedures.name: Occlusion of right femoral artery with intraluminal devices
procedures.evidence_span: Vascular intervention was required, including occlusion of the right vertebral artery and right femoral artery with intraluminal devices via percutaneous approach

procedures.name: Mechanical ventilation for greater than 96 consecutive hours
procedures.evidence_span: The patient required prolonged mechanical ventilation for greater than 96 consecutive hours

procedures.name: Bronchoscopic procedures with extirpation from left lower lobe and left main bronchus
procedures.evidence_span: Aggressive airway management included multiple bronchoscopic procedures with extirpation of matter from the left lower lobe and left main bronchus

procedures.name: Diagnostic drainage of right lower lobe bronchus
procedures.evidence_span: Diagnostic drainage of the right lower lobe bronchus was also performed

procedures.name: Continuous renal replacement therapy (CRRT)
procedures.evidence_span: Continuous renal replacement therapy (CRRT) was initiated given acute kidney failure superimposed on chronic kidney disease and hepatorenal syndrome

procedures.name: Hemodialysis with urinary filtration
procedures.evidence_span: Multiple sessions of hemodialysis with urinary filtration were performed using both heparin-based and citrate-based anticoagulation protocols

chief_complaint: Altered mental status and abdominal pain
